---
title: "Portfolio CHEM806 - Sam Samler"
editor: visual
---

Hello World. This is my Portfolio for learning R in CHEM806. Enjoy!
- Sam Samler 

# Course Lessons

- Introduction to Literate Analysis Using Quarto
- Tidy Data
- Cleaning and Wrangling Data
- Data Visualization 

# Course Projects 

## a01- Quarto Literate Analysis 

[Quarto Literate Analysis](assignments/a01_quarto_literate_analysis.html)

## a08- Intro to Spatial Data 

[Spacial Data Introduction](assignments/intro_to_spatial_data.html)

[Decision Log a08](assignments/Samler_decision_log.html)
